2606.09198.title: MASS: Deep Research for Social Sciences with Memory-Augmented Social Simulation
2606.09198.paper_summary: Deep Research agents powered by Large Language Models (LLMs) have exhibited extraordinary potential in automated paper writing tasks. However, existing systems rely heavily on literature retrieval and synthesis through internet and local knowledge bases, often resulting research in lacking insight and creativity in social science. To address this issue, we propose "Memory-Augmented Social Simulation (MASS)", an innovative paradigm that leverages highly realistic and research-oriented social simulations to enhance the creativity and empirical founding of LLMs-generated research. Specifically, MASS integrates three core components: dynamic goal-path planning with multi-level social norm restraint to guide the simulation, a multi-disciplinary behavior dataset for agent memory cold-start, and a structured forgetting mechanism inspired by the Ebbinghaus curve. Together, these ensure simulation authenticity and provide a robust empirical foundation for generating innovative scholarly papers. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of our method, showing a 6.81\% improvement in generation overall quality over foundation LLMs and 17.19\% gain in Insight over strong baselines.
2606.09198.paper_summary_zh: 深度研究代理人由大型語言模型（LLMs）驅動，在自動化論文寫作任務中展現了非凡的潛力。<lb/>然而，現有系統在文獻檢索和通過互聯網及本地知識庫的綜合上過於依賴，常常導致社會科學研究缺乏洞察力和創造力。<lb/>為了解決這個問題，我們提出了「記憶增強社會模擬（MASS）」，這是一種創新的範式，利用高度真實和以研究為導向的社會模擬來增強LLMs生成研究的創造力和實證基礎。<lb/>具體而言，MASS整合了三個核心組件：動態目標路徑規劃，結合多層次社會規範約束以指導模擬，一個多學科行為數據集用於代理記憶的冷啟動，以及一種受艾賓浩斯曲線啟發的結構性遺忘機制。<lb/>這些組件共同確保模擬的真實性，並為生成創新的學術論文提供了堅實的實證基礎。<lb/>實驗結果證明了我們方法的有效性，顯示出生成整體質量比基礎LLMs提高了6.81\%，在洞察力方面比強基準增長了17.19\%。
2606.09198.author: Yongrui Liu et.al.
